## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No new permissions added without justification in `docs/permissions.md`
- [ ] Privacy docs updated if data handling changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing change
